hospitalizations.principal_dx_description: Malignant neoplasm of head of pancreas — planned pylorus-preserving pancreaticoduodenectomy
hospitalizations.reason: Planned Whipple procedure (pylorus-preserving pancreaticoduodenectomy) for pancreatic head adenocarcinoma; postoperative course complicated by grade B pancreatic fistula and delayed gastric emptying

hospitalizations.principal_dx_description: Recurrent peripancreatic fluid collection with elevated amylase/lipase following pancreatectomy
hospitalizations.reason: Recurrent small peripancreatic fluid collection (4 cm) with elevated amylase and lipase during adjuvant gemcitabine/capecitabine cycle 3; managed with IV piperacillin-tazobactam, bowel rest, and TPN; no percutaneous drainage required

medications.frequency: continuous infusion over 46 hours every 2 weeks

medications.dose: 830 mg/m2 twice daily (reduced from 1660 mg/m2/day at cycle 2, then further to 50% at cycle 4)

medications.frequency: prior to nab-paclitaxel each infusion day
per institutional protocol, once per cycle
